name: Greek Lamb Stew
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Elizabeth Powell
Preparation Time: 2:30
Season the flour with salt and pepper. Dredge the lamb cubes in it.
Heat olive oil in a large soup kettle over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb cubes in the oil.
Sprinkle herbs and garlic over the lamb.
Add stock, wine, and tomato sauce.
Season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
Simmer over medium heat for 1-1/2 hours.
Add blanched onions and olives. Simmer for an additional half hour.
